Eligibility requires lifecycle_status published, original_summary, official_website_url, canonical slug, seo_indexable true, and no stale/quarantine/rejected/copied-content/directory-hint blocker. No raw seed/evidence/audit/review/quarantine/rejected/stale/archived records, Public API/MCP release, deploy, server action, Supabase/staging/production write, runtime, Redis/queue, external outreach, or data repo mutation occurred.
